Off Calendar Aug-02-2016 Continued To Aug-16-16 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: REPORT, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
Off Calendar Jul-05-2016 Continued To Aug-02-16 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: No appearance was made by any Party, Counsel or Interested Person.

An Order to Appear will be issued to the Executor Jill Lu and the Attorney Ronald Chun to appear on August 2, 2016 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 to explain why they have not responded to the examiner's notes regarding the pending petition and why they did not appear today. The status hearing is also continued to that date.

Judge: Peter J. Busch. Clerk: Leslie Gomez. Bailiff: Deputy Rosado. (Not Reported)

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: REPORT, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
Off Calendar Jun-07-2016 Continued To Jul-05-16 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: REPORT, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
Off Calendar May-10-2016 Continued To Jun-07-16 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: REPORT, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
Off Calendar Mar-29-2016 Continued To May-10-16 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

ORDER OF STATUS HEARING
Off Calendar Mar-01-2016 Off Calendar

PROBATE ACCOUNTING STATUS PETITION
Off Calendar Mar-01-2016 Off Calendar

PROBATE ACCOUNTING STATUS PETITION
Off Calendar Feb-02-2016 Continued To Mar-01-16 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: No appearance was made by any Party, Counsel or Interested Person.

The Court stated that it had been advised that Mr. Chun was ill, that this matter has been on calendar many times, that it has been told that the accounting was done and ready to go but still has not been filed. An Order to Appear will be issued to the executor Jill Lu and the Attorney Ronald Chun to appear on March 1, 2016 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 to explain why the accounting petition has not been filed. The status hearing is also continued to that date. If a petition is not on file by February 25, 2016 the court will consider a $25.00 per day penalty fee for failure to have done so.

Judge: Peter J. Busch. Clerk: Leslie Gomez. Bailiff: Deputy Barrientos. (Not Reported)

PROBATE ACCOUNTING STATUS PETITION
Off Calendar Jan-12-2016 Continued To Feb-02-16 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Ronald Chun for (personal representative) Jill Lu.

Mr. Chun apologized to the court, stated that personal issues prohibited him from finishing up the accounting and requested an additional 3 weeks. The status on filing an accounting petition was continued to February 2, 2016 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 with the expectation that the petition will be filed prior to that date.

Judge: Peter J. Busch. Clerk: Leslie Gomez. Bailiff: Deputy Barrientos. (Not Reported)

PROBATE ACCOUNTING STATUS PETITION
Off Calendar Dec-09-2015 Continued To Jan-12-16 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Ronald Chun for petitioner Jill Lu.

Mr. Chun advised the Court that the accounting has now been completed, and he is in the process of finalizing the petition. He requested a two-week continuance to get the petition on file. The Court asked if additional time might be necessary in view of the holidays, and Mr. Chun agreed it would be helpful. The status hearing was continued to January 12, 2016 at 9:00 a.m. in Dept. 204.

Judge: Peter J. Busch. Clerk: Craig Blackstone. Bailiff: Deputy Kabasares. (Not reported)

PROBATE ACCOUNTING STATUS PETITION
Off Calendar Nov-25-2015 Continued To Dec-09-15 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

PROBATE ACCOUNTING STATUS PETITION
Off Calendar Oct-28-2015 Continued To Nov-25-15 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Ronald Chun for Jill Lu.

Mr. Chun reported that they are working on getting the final accounting completed, that they still need receipts for medical expenses, that Ms. Lu is working diligently to obtain the receipts and that if she finds she does not have certain receipts they will not include those expenses. The accounting status report was continued to November 25, 2015 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Peter J. Busch. Clerk: Leslie Gomez. Bailiff: Deputy Kabasares. (Not Reported)

PROBATE ACCOUNTING STATUS PETITION
Off Calendar Sep-30-2015 Continued To Oct-28-15 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Ronald Chun for (personal representative) Jill Lu.

Mr. Chun reported that the inventory has been filed, that they are in the middle of preparing the petition and that there is only about $300,000.00 in the estate. The status on filing an accounting was continued to October 28, 2015 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Peter J. Busch. Clerk: Leslie Gomez. Bailiff: Deputies Watts & Siu. (Not Reported)

PROBATE ACCOUNTING STATUS PETITION
Off Calendar Aug-04-2015 Continued To Sep-30-15 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Ronald Chun for Petitioner Jill R. Lu

In response to the Court's inquiry as to where things are now, Mr. Chun explained that the Probate Referee had requested to be provided with additional information which Mr. Chun needed to obtain from the accountant, and which the accountant had been unable to provide without the partnership agreement which he did not have. Mr. Chun has now received the information desired from the accountant, and he passed it along to the Probate Referee about 1 and 1/2 weeks ago. Mr. Chun is now waiting for the Probate Referee to complete the valuation. The status hearing regarding the filing of the accounting was continued to September 30, 2015 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Judge: Peter J. Busch. Clerk: Craig Blackstone/Ella Yip. Bailiff: Deputy Kabasares. (Not reported)

PROBATE ACCOUNTING STATUS PETITION
Off Calendar Jul-07-2015 Continued To Aug-04-15 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Ronald Chun for Jill Lu.

Mr. Chun apologized to the court for the non-appearance on June 9, 2015 and explained it was due to mis-calendaring. Mr. Chun reported that Ms. Lu is cooperating, that the inventory & appraisal has been signed and turned over to the probate referee and that the referee needs additional information/documents that have been requested from the CPA with the expectation that she will have them within a week. The probate accounting status report was continued to August 4, 2015 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204. The Order to Appear is off calendar.

Judge: Peter J. Busch. Clerk: Leslie Gomez. Bailiff: Deputy Kabasares. (Not Reported)

ORDER OF STATUS HEARING
Off Calendar Jul-07-2015 Off Calendar

PROBATE ACCOUNTING STATUS PETITION
Off Calendar Jun-09-2015 Continued To Jul-07-15 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: No appearance was made by any Party, Counsel or Interested Person.

An Order to Appear will be issued to attorney Ronald Chun to appear on July 7, 2015 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 to explain why the Inventory & Appraisal and a petition to close the estate has not been filed. The status hearing is also continued to that date.

Judge: Peter J. Busch. Clerk: Leslie Gomez. Bailiff: Deputy Allen. (Not Reported)

PROBATE ACCOUNTING STATUS PETITION
Off Calendar May-05-2015 Continued To Jun-09-15 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Ronald Chun for (executor) Jill Lu.

Mr. Chun reported that he and his client have come to an agreement regarding him remaining as counsel, that he will need additional time to get the inventory done, that he is now able to focus on the matter, that he can get the bank account and K1 ready for the referee within the next 6 weeks and the final petition within 5 months. The court stated that its patience is running thin, that this matter must be finished, that it is not sure why it will take this long to finish, that this is the last chance and asked who Mr. Winger is. Mr. Chun stated that Mr. Winger is out of state and has not been contacted. The probate accounting status report was continued to June 9, 2015 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 with the expectation that an inventory and appraisal will have been filed, that there is a plan in place for moving forward and that Ms. Lu remains involved in working to get this done.

Judge: Peter J. Busch. Clerk: Leslie Gomez. Bailiff: Deputy Allen. (Not Reported)

PROBATE ACCOUNTING STATUS PETITION
Off Calendar Mar-24-2015 Continued To May-05-15 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Ronald Chun for (personal representative) Jill Lu.

Mr. Chun reported that he is trying to find outside counsel to take over, that the case has been frustrating, that the personal representative has filed bankruptcy, that there is only 1 bank account with less than $2,000.00 in it, agreed that the corporate holdings should have been turned over to a probate referee and asked for a continuance to get this back on track. The probate accounting status report was continued to May 5, 2015 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Peter J. Busch. Clerk: Leslie Gomez. Bailiff: Deputy Allen. (Not Reported)

PROBATE ACCOUNTING STATUS PETITION
Off Calendar Sep-30-2014 Continued To Mar-24-15 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Ronald Chun for Jill Lu (Executor).

The Court noted that this matter has been going on for a long time and that no inventory has been filed. Mr. Chun stated that this is a complicated matter and the assets are shareholder interests in privately held partnerships and corporations, that he and his client are both frustrated but that they are gathering information and moving forward to complete this matter and that he is requesting a one year continuance. The Court will only allow a six month continuance and stated that if the Executor fails to perform, she will be subject to removal and reduction of statutory fees. Mr. Chun stated that there are no funds to pay fees and that he has advanced the costs. The Status of Administration was continued to March 24, 2015 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Paul H. Alvarado. Clerk: Ella Yip. Bailiff: Deputy McConico. (Not Reported)

Status on filing of a Petition for Final Distribution or a Petition for Approval of Status Report was continued to November 4, 2013 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.
